layout_settings.section_h2: Nearly 25,000 sq ft of Lifestyle Amenities
layout_settings.section_text: Whether it’s recreation, leisure, relaxation, or social gathering, the amenities invite residents to live fully, with dedicated spaces and programs for wellness, community and connection, or quiet reflection.

layouts.caption: Yoga mats for wellness
layouts.title: Wellness & Vitality
layouts.text: A light-filled fitness center and yoga studio primed for everyday use
layouts.text_chinese:
裏才怕目一在方時干信自百奶筆不目乞找完爬！乾禾耳婆香浪休訴她蝶兆三昌羊比汁位？占植申弓心它久鳥。
支回活哥亭因魚汗法婆入：消買長流哭園嗎穴訴泉花走兆；寺向員交十師八歌下穿住干昌幾里，紅木時英把流面泉完語巾子了拍用各。
layouts.list:
Fitness Center
Fully-equipped fitness facility with expansive windows
Cardio equipment with TVs, free weights, and multi-gym system
Towel service and water station

Yoga & Pilates Studio
Pilates reformers
On demand virtual fitness
Large TV screen embedded in mirror wall
Yoga mats, suspension training and strength training accessories
Towel service
layouts.list_chinese:
裏才怕目
在方時干信自百奶筆
不目乞找完爬
乾禾耳婆香浪休訴她蝶
兆三昌羊比汁位
占植申弓心它久鳥

layouts.caption: A caption about pools and spas
layouts.title: Retreat & Relax
layouts.text: From sauna to steam, lounge to sundeck, Park Row provides restorative spaces for body and mind.
layouts.list:
Indoor Pool & Spa
~60-ft indoor swimming pool
Circular spa
Connected outdoor sundeck with lounge seating
Steam & sauna
Men’s and women’s locker room
Towel service

content.title: Social Gathering & Community
content.text: Elegant lounges, landscaped terraces, and private dining room designed for connection—celebrating Bellevue’s gracious way of life.

content.list:
Resident Lounge
Comfortable seating arrangements for socializing, working or relaxing
Custom entertaining kitchen with stunning stone island for gatherings
Dual, multisided fireplaces
Seamless glass wall opening to terrace

Terrace Lounge
Expansive three-sided landscaped terrace with city views
Lounge seating with multiple outdoor fireside retreats for relaxing or gathering
Dining spaces equipped with gas barbecues and pizza oven

Collab Room
Semi-private space for focused work, collaborative projects, or casual games

content.title: Private Dining
content.text: An elegant setting for intimate occasions and memorable gatherings. The private dining room feels both exclusive and inviting. Whether celebrating with family or hosting among friends, every detail reflects a sense of elevated hospitality.
content.list:
Communal table for entertaining
Large food preparation and serving island
Convenient access to terrace with fireside seating

content.title: Additional Amenities & Services
content.text: Concierge services, secure parking, and thoughtful conveniences make every day seamless, so residents can focus on what truly matters.
content.list:
Lobby Lounge
24-hour attended lobby
Lounge seating
Custom marble clad fireplace
Double height dramatic marble feature wall
Mail room with self-service package lockers
Package delivery acceptance service

Library
Integrated seating and book collection overlooking double-height lobby
Adjacent to arched art corridor with direct access to landscaped plaza and Bellevue Downtown Park

Golf Simulator Lounge
Golf simulation trainer
Rich wood and stone beverage area with sink and fridge and lounge seating

Bike Tune-Up & Storage
Storage rooms equipped with bike racks
Tune-up and repair station
Bike wash

Pet Spa
Stainless steel pet washing station equipped with dryer and utility sink

Pet Retreat
Partially covered pet play area with seating

Car Wash
Full-service cleaning with powerful stainless-steel vacuum, high-foaming shampoo and fragrance station, and a rugged, all-in-one self-service wash system
Extra Touches:
Controlled building entry
Destination elevators with restricted access control
Self-service package lockers
Gated resident parking
Electric vehicle charging option for individual residences
Community electric vehicle charging station
High-speed wifi throughout building and amenity spaces
Onsite resident storage
